records.ety: [L., a spy, explorer, investigator: cf. F. spculateur.]

defs: One who speculates. Specifically: (a) An observer; a contemplator; hence, a spy; a watcher.
One who forms theories; a theorist.
One who engages in speculation; one who buys and sells goods, land, etc., with the expectation of deriving profit from fluctuations in price.
quotes: A speculator who had dared to affirm that the human soul is by nature mortal.
